page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.2xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, this instance provides 8 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, resulting in 8 vCPUs. It is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance features a 35 MB L3 cache and supports instruction sets such as AVX, AVX-512F, AES, and FMA. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and featuring a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate that the ecs.g5ne.2xlarge sits primarily in the lower-to-average tiers. In CPU-intensive tasks, stress-ng single-core and multi-core benchmarks place the instance in the bottom 25%. Similarly, Geekbench single-core and multi-core scores are weak, falling into the bottom 25%. However, the instance demonstrates average performance in uncached memory bandwidth tests, with read speeds of 38.97 GB/sec and write speeds of 34.64 GB/sec. Redis SET operations also perform at an average level, achieving 5.91 million operations per second. For lightweight machine learning, the instance manages average prompt processing and text generation speeds on small 135M parameter models, though performance drops to poor on larger 7B models.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.g5ne.2xlarge offers dedicated x86_64 resources on a legacy hardware platform, making it a budget-conscious option for workloads that require predictable CPU allocation without needing cutting-edge performance. Given its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and moderate network capabilities, this instance is best suited for general-purpose workloads, basic Redis caching, lightweight web serving, and development or testing environments that do not demand high-speed local storage or intensive parallel processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.2xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 8 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor at 2.5 GHz, paired with 32.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the x86_64 architecture, this KVM-hypervised instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, utilizing a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. Benchmark data indicates weak single-core and multi-core CPU performance, placing it in the bottom 25% for stress-ng and Geekbench tests. However, it achieves average results in uncached memory bandwidth and Redis SET operations, processing 5.91 million operations per second. Given its legacy hardware profile, the ecs.g5ne.2xlarge offers a cost-effective option for dedicated resources. It is best suited for general-purpose applications, development environments, basic caching, and moderate web serving.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.2xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and 4 Gbps network bandwidth, suitable for basic caching and development workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.2xlarge features 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 32 GB RAM, offering balanced resources for general-purpose workloads.
tagline: A budget-friendly, general-purpose instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon cores and balanced memory for standard enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs at 2.5 GHz
Equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM providing a balanced 1:4 resource ratio
Features 4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Delivers average performance for Redis caching and uncached memory operations
Best suited for general-purpose applications, development, and light web serving
